jobs.title: Rangierdienst Spezialist/in
jobs.description:
Arxada ist ein weltweit führendes Unternehmen für innovative Lösungen zum Schutz unserer Welt. Unsere bahnbrechenden Technologien, umfassende regulatorische Expertise sowie unsere Kompetenz in der Produktion und Prozessentwicklung unterstützen unsere Kunden dabei, Ernährung, Gesundheit und Infrastruktur auf effiziente Weise zu schützen – durch Chemie und Biotechnologie, die Nachhaltigkeit fördern.
 
 Wir bieten ein breites Portfolio an Inhaltsstoffen und Dienstleistungen für verschiedene Endmärkte, darunter Gesundheit & Ernährung, Haushalts- und Körperpflege, Professionelle Hygiene, Lacke & Beschichtungen sowie Holzschutz.
 Mit Kunden in über 100 Ländern erzielte das Unternehmen im Jahr 2024 einen Umsatz von 2 Milliarden CHF. Der Hauptsitz von Arxada befindet sich in Basel (Schweiz). Weltweit beschäftigt das Unternehmen 3.200 Mitarbeitende an 24 Produktionsstandorten und in 14 F&E-Zentren, die alle dem Erfolg unserer Kunden verpflichtet sind.
 
 Beweg was – als Rangierdienst Spezialist/in (Tagesarbeit) 
 
 Zur Verstärkung unseres Rangierteams in Visp, Schweiz suchen wir eine engagierte, zuverlässige Persönlichkeit. Wenn du Erfahrung im Rangierdienst hast, präzise arbeitest und Teamwork schätzt, bist du bei uns genau richtig. Gemeinsam sorgen wir dafür, dass unsere Warenströme reibungslos auf Schiene bleiben.
 
 Hauptaufgaben und Verantwortung: 
 
• Termingerechtes Zustellen und Abholen von Bahnwagen an den entsprechenden Umschlagstationen

• Verteilen und Zusammenstellen von Zugskompositionen

• Erfassen von Ein- und Ausgangswägungen

• Selbstständige Koordination mit internen Ansprechpartnern wie Produktion, Spedition und Disposition zur Sicherstellung termingerechter Versände

• Bereitschaft zum Pikettdienst , um die durchgehende Versorgung der Betriebsbereiche sicherzustellen

• Abstimmung und Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Schnittstellen wie Betrieben, Spedition, Fahrdienst und interner Logistik
 
 Qualifikationen und Erfahrung: 
 
• Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Eisenbahner im Betriebsdienst (Fachrichtung Lokführer und Transport) oder vergleichbare Qualifikation durch interne Schulungen bei Bahnunternehmen

• Gültiger Rangierausweis Kategorie Ai40 (zwingend erforderlich)

• Ausweis Kategorie A40 von Vorteil (oder Bereitschaft, diese Qualifikation zu erwerben)

• Gute Kenntnisse in gängigen Office-Anwendungen (z. B. Excel, Outlook)

• Organisationstalent sowie eine strukturierte und zuverlässige Arbeitsweise

• Gute körperliche Verfassung

• Hohe Flexibilität, Teamfähigkeit und ausgeprägte Eigeninitiative
 
 Arxada bietet erstklassige Lösungen in zwei klar abgegrenzten Bereichen:
 
 Microbial Control Solutions (MCS) konzentriert sich auf Bedrohungen durch Mikroorganismen für Mensch und Umwelt. Dieser Bereich umfasst fünf eigenständige Geschäftsbereiche: Professionelle Hygiene, Haushalts- und Körperpflege, Holzschutz, Lacke & Beschichtungen sowie Materialschutz.
 
 Nutrition, Care & Environmental (NCE) liefert Materialien für die Herstellung von Verbundstoffen in der Elektronik, Luft- und Raumfahrt und anderen Branchen. Darüber hinaus umfasst das Portfolio Vitamine und Nährstoffkomponenten, chemische Zwischenprodukte mit hoher Leistungsfähigkeit sowie Rohstoffe für eine Vielzahl anspruchsvoller Anwendungen.
 
 Arxada ist ein Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit fördert. Alle qualifizierten Bewerberinnen und Bewerber werden unabhängig von Hautfarbe, Religion, ethnischer Herkunft, Geschlecht, sexueller Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität, Alter, Behinderung, Status als geschützte/r Veteran/in oder anderen gesetzlich geschützten Merkmalen gleichermaßen berücksichtigt.
 
 #LI-CM1 
 
 
 
CH15

Arxada is a global specialty chemicals company with major production facilities in Visp (Valais), Switzerland. The company develops innovative solutions for microbial control, nutrition, care, and environmental applications.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Descrizione Arxada è un'azienda leader mondiale per soluzioni innovative per la protezione del nostro mondo. Le nostre tecnologie rivoluzionarie, l'esperienza regolatoria completa e le competenze nella produzione e nello sviluppo dei processi supportano i nostri clienti nel proteggere in modo efficiente l'alimentazione, la salute e l'infrastruttura attraverso la chimica e la biotecnologia che promuovono la sostenibilità.
• Offriamo un'ampia gamma di ingredienti e servizi per vari mercati finali, tra cui Salute e Alimentazione, Igiene Professionale, Casa e Cura Personale, Vernici e Rivestimenti, Protezione del Legno. Con clienti in oltre 100 paesi, l'azienda ha registrato un fatturato di 2 miliardi di CHF nel 2024. La sede principale di Arxada si trova a Basilea (Svizzera). L'azienda impiega globalmente 3.200 persone in 24 siti di produzione e 14 centri di ricerca e sviluppo, tutti dedicati al successo dei nostri clienti. Per rafforzare il nostro team a Visp, Svizzera, stiamo cercando uno/a Specialista in Servizio di Manovra. Ti piace quando tutto funziona come previsto - letteralmente? Hai esperienza nel servizio di manovra e vuoi contribuire dove conta la precisione, il lavoro di squadra e la affidabilità? Allora stiamo cercando proprio te! Per rafforzare il nostro team di manovra esperto a Visp, cerchiamo una personalità coinvolta che pensi con noi, agisca e mantenga i flussi di merci interni su rotaia. ## Principali Compiti e Responsabilità: - Consegna e ritiro tempestivi di vagoni ferroviari nelle stazioni di smistamento appropriate - Distribuzione e composizione di treni - Registrazione di pesi di ingresso e uscita - Coordinamento autonomo con partner interni come produzione, spedizione e disposizione per garantire spedizioni tempestive - Disponibilità per il servizio di guardia per garantire la fornitura continua delle aree operative - Coordinamento e collaborazione con diverse interfacce come impianti, spedizione, servizio ferroviario e logistica interna ## Qualificazioni e Esperienza: - Licenza di manovra categoria Ai40 è obbligatoria - Licenza categoria A40 è un vantaggio (o disponibilità a completare la formazione) - Buone conoscenze delle applicazioni office comuni (ad esempio Excel, Outlook) - Talento organizzativo, metodo di lavoro strutturato e buona forma fisica - Flessibilità, capacità di lavorare in squadra e alta autonomia ## Cosa
• Offriamo Arxada offre soluzioni di prima classe in due aree distinte: - Microbial Control Solutions (MCS) si concentra sulle minacce microbiche per l'uomo e l'ambiente. Questo settore comprende cinque settori di business autonomi: Igiene Professionale, Casa e Cura Personale, Protezione del Legno, Vernici e Rivestimenti, Protezione dei Materiali. - Nutrition, Care & Environmental (NCE) fornisce materiali per la produzione di composti in elettronica, aerospaziale e altre industrie. Inoltre, il portafoglio include vitamine e componenti nutrizionali, intermedi chimici ad alto rendimento e materie prime per una vasta gamma di applicazioni avanzate. Arxada è un datore di lavoro che promuove l'uguaglianza delle opportunità. Tutte le candidate e i candidati qualificati vengono considerate indipendentemente da colore della pelle, religione, origine etnica, genere, orientamento sessuale, identità di genere, età, disabilità, stato di veterano protetto o altri tratti protetti dalla legge. #LI-CM1
descriptionByLocale.en:
Description Arxada is a global leader in innovative solutions for protecting our world. Our groundbreaking technologies, comprehensive regulatory expertise, and production and process development capabilities support our customers in protecting food, health, and infrastructure efficiently through chemistry and biotechnology that promote sustainability.
• We offer a broad portfolio of ingredients and services for various end markets, including Health & Nutrition, Household & Personal Care, Professional Hygiene, Paints & Coatings, and Wood Protection. With customers in over 100 countries, the company achieved a revenue of 2 billion CHF in 2024. The headquarters of Arxada is located in Basel (Switzerland). Globally, the company employs 3,200 people at 24 production sites and 14 R&D centers, all dedicated to our customers' success. To strengthen our team in Visp, Switzerland, we are looking for a Yard Service Specialist. Do you love it when everything runs exactly as planned – literally? Do you have experience in yard service and want to contribute where precision, teamwork, and reliability matter? Then we are looking for you! To strengthen our experienced yard team in Visp, we are looking for an engaged personality who thinks with us, takes action, and keeps the internal goods flows on track. ## Key
• Responsibilities: - Timely delivery and collection of railway wagons at the appropriate transshipment stations - Distribution and assembly of train compositions - Recording of incoming and outgoing weighings - Independent coordination with internal partners such as production, forwarding, and disposition to ensure timely shipments - Availability for on-call duty to ensure continuous supply of operational areas - Coordination and collaboration with various interfaces such as plants, forwarding, train service, and internal logistics ##
• Qualifications and Experience: - Yard service license category Ai40 is mandatory - License category A40 is an advantage (or willingness to complete the training) - Good knowledge of common office applications (e.g., Excel, Outlook) - Organizational talent, structured work method, and good physical condition - High flexibility, team spirit, and a high degree of initiative ## What We Offer Arxada offers top-tier solutions in two distinct areas: - Microbial Control Solutions (MCS) focuses on microbial threats to humans and the environment. This sector comprises five independent business segments: Professional Hygiene, Household & Personal Care, Wood Protection, Paints & Coatings, and Material Protection. - Nutrition, Care & Environmental (NCE) provides materials for the production of compounds in electronics, aerospace, and other industries. Additionally, the portfolio includes vitamins and nutritional components, high-performance chemical intermediates, and raw materials for a wide range of advanced applications. Arxada is an employer that promotes equal opportunity. All qualified applicants are considered for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. #LI-CM1

Arxada is a world leader in innovative solutions to protect our world. Our groundbreaking technologies, comprehensive regulatory expertise as well as our expertise in production and process development help our customers to efficiently protect food, health and infrastructure – through chemistry and biotechnology that promote sustainability.

We offer a wide range of ingredients and services for various end markets, including health & nutrition, household & body care, professional hygiene, varnishes & coatings as well as wood protection.
With customers in over 100 countries, the company generated sales of CHF 2 billion in 2024. Arxada is headquartered in Basel (Switzerland). The company employs 3,200 employees worldwide at 24 production sites and in 14 R&E centres, all committed to the success of our customers.

Mansioni
To strengthen our team in Visp, Switzerland, we are looking for a dedicated, reliable personality as a training coordinator.

- Ensuring efficient and smooth running of training

Cosa offriamo

- Nutrition, Care & Environmental (NCE) supplies materials for manufacturing composites in electronics, aerospace and other industries. In addition, the portfolio includes vitamins and nutrient components, high-performance chemical intermediates and raw materials for a variety of demanding applications.
